Class GameEngine

java.lang.Object
splendor.logic.GameEngine
public class GameEngine extends Object
Applies Splendor rules to a GameState.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    GameEngine(GameState gameState)
    Creates an engine for the supplied game state.
